_comment: Rename to tracked_movies.json to activate. Titles or slugs both work and format suffixes are not needed: 'Lenin' matches 'Lenin (2D - Telugu)' and 'Lenin (IMAX - Telugu)'.
_mode: 'all' collects every movie (same as having no file). 'selected' collects ONLY the list below.
_hide_untracked: Applies to movies ALREADY collected. true (default) = the dashboard shows only the tracked list, everything else vanishes from the site. false = already-collected movies stay visible and the list only limits NEW scraping. Either way the raw data in R2 is untouched, so this is reversible.
_dubs: A film released under a DIFFERENT TITLE per language is a SEPARATE movie with its own card. List each title you want tracked. Example: Jana Nayagan (Tamil), Jana Nayakudu (Telugu), Jan Neta (Hindi) are three entries, not one.
_warning: Filtering happens during the SCRAPE, so untracked movies are never stored going forward. Adding a title later gives it NO back-history - tracking starts from that moment. Add a movie BEFORE its bookings open.
